Announcement.title: Announcement
Announcement.description: Banner configuration for parish announcements shown on the homepage altar alert bar.

roTitle.description: Title of the advertisement / announcement in Romanian language.

roText.description: Detailed text of the announcement in Romanian language.

enTitle.description: Title of the announcement in English language.

enText.description: Detailed text of the announcement in English language.

active.description: Toggle indicating if this announcement is currently active and visible to visitors.

ServicesList.title: ServicesList
ServicesList.description: List of regular scheduled services of the parish.

Gallery.title: Gallery
Gallery.description: Store list of custom parish photos and Youtube videos.

photos.description: Array of uploaded photos with storage URLs.

videos.description: Array of YouTube videos with titles.

settings/announcement.description: Holds the latest liturgical parish banner info

settings/services.description: Holds the ordered array list of holy services

settings/gallery.description: Holds lists of photo URLs and YouTube videos for the parish
